prompt:
Evidence events follow as JSON (id, kind, observed_at, text). Return JSON with keys: "score" (0..1), "trend" (-1..1, direction over time), "confidence" (0..1, how well the evidence supports the score), "evidence_event_ids" (ids you relied on — ONLY ids from the provided list), "rationale" (one paragraph). Thin or missing evidence means low confidence, never an invented score.

Both numbers are in CI so you can watch them regress.\""}, {"event_id": "d8212b59-866c-53da-9d56-160db0557117", "kind": "repo_activity", "observed_at": "2025-12-15T22:09:03.111928+00:00", "text": "commit e5a1b76 \"overlay snapshot restore in 8ms; benchmark committed alongside\""}, {"event_id": "7e11e6a9-c121-59d5-bdab-a644cbb39505", "kind": "release", "observed_at": "2026-03-04T00:09:03.111928+00:00", "text": "v0.3.0 \u2014 \"snapshot restore, plus a written threat model naming what this does NOT contain\""}, {"event_id": "b1dd1fcc-0740-5d50-af3a-e1dbe0da8fea", "kind": "green_flag", "observed_at": "2026-07-19T03:14:35.623984+00:00", "text": "14/25 applicable green flags fired"}]
